genre_refs: Truth Social / X post screenshot card
description: Graphic laid out as a social-media post card on a white background. At top left is a circular avatar showing a portrait of Donald Trump's face overprinted with the American flag (red/white stripes and a blue field over the features). Next to it in bold black text is 'Donald J. Trump' followed by a pink/magenta verified checkmark badge and a small dark square app icon, with the gray handle '@realDonaldTrump' beneath. The body, in large black sans-serif, reads: 'For Iran, the Clock is Ticking, and they better get moving, FAST, or there won't be anything left of them. TIME IS OF THE ESSENCE! President DJT'.
notable_text: Donald J. Trump @realDonaldTrump - For Iran, the Clock is Ticking, and they better get moving, FAST, or there won't be anything left of them. TIME IS OF THE ESSENCE! President DJT
